examples: It would be dishonest to mislead people and not to present the data as fairly as possible.
As a result, these advertisements could mislead children and their parents.
Some irresponsible websites allowed restaurants to post false pictures that could mislead customers.
One reason, say churchmen, is that a minaret on the skyline might mislead first-time visitors.
If somebody does plagiarise or deliberately try to mislead they will be treated very seriously.
